title: Overfitting in ML model training
description: Train ML model with insufficient validation data leading to overfitting

mutation.description: Use same dataset for training and validation

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect overfitting through validation metrics analysis

title: Data poisoning in training dataset
description: Introduce adversarial examples in training data that compromise model accuracy

mutation.description: Add poisoned samples that bias model predictions

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect data poisoning through anomaly detection

title: ML pipeline with data leakage
description: Preprocessing pipeline that leaks future information into training data

mutation.description: Include target variable in feature engineering for training

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect data leakage in ML pipeline

title: Model deployment without monitoring
description: Deploy ML model without performance monitoring or drift detection

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect lack of ML model monitoring

title: Bias in ML training data
description: Training data with systematic bias leading to discriminatory model predictions

mutation.description: Disable bias detection in formal model

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect bias in ML training through fairness metrics
